directorLines.chinese: 塞納河畔 左岸的咖啡
directorLines.pinyin: sāi nà hé pàn   zuǒ àn de kā fēi
directorLines.meaning: The Seine River bank, coffee on the left
directorLines.hearsay: Say now a hot pan, so on the car fee
directorLines.visual: A person is frantically cooking an omelet on a scorching hot frying pan balanced precariously on the hood of a luxury sports car while a meter maid writes a parking ticket.
